---
title: "Release, or, Caroline’s French Kindred, The"
---

## Release, or, Caroline’s French Kindred, The

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** September 1896
**Genre:** Fiction (historical)
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** London and New York: Macmillan and Company.

### Notes

This is a sequel to <i>The Chaplet of Pearls </i>and <i>Stray Pearls.</i>

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
